data.title: China's ETF Connect program adds 14 ETFs from ChinaAMC, now offering access to 98 onshore ETFs for offshore investors.
data.description: ChinaAMC has expanded its range by adding 14 new ETFs, solidifying its position as the largest fund company with a total of 98 products. As of today, offshore investors can access these new onshore ETFs through the Stock Connect program. This move enables investors to diversify their portfolios and gain exposure to various new markets.

data.title: WHOOP partners with Scuderia Ferrari HP as Official Health and Fitness Wearable Partner. Team to host WHOOP logo in 2026 season.
data.description: In Boston, WHOOP, the human performance company, has revealed a significant partnership with Scuderia Ferrari HP on a global scale. Beginning in the 2026 season, WHOOP will serve as the Official Health and Fitness Wearable Partner and Team Partner of Scuderia Ferrari HP. As part of the collaboration, Scuderia Ferrari HP cars and drivers will showcase the WHOOP logo, and all team members will receive WHOOP devices to gain valuable insights into their health, recovery, and fitness levels. Moreover, this partnership will introduce an innovative integration with the team's medical support.

data.title: Read quotes from Danny Meyer, Naval Ravikant, and more on support, persistence, and focus. Source: Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Discover motivating quotes on the importance of forming a strong support network, cultivating perseverance, and prioritizing essential aspects of life. The publication "Investor's Business Daily" features an article showcasing inspirational remarks from prominent figures such as Danny Meyer and Naval Ravikant. data.title: e& and IBM introduce advanced agentic AI for governance/compliance at Davos World Economic Forum, embedding AI into systems.
data.description: During the World Economic Forum in Davos, the deployment was introduced as e& transitions beyond standard chatbots to enterprise-level agentic AI. Utilizing IBM Watson's Orchestrate technology, the agentic AI is integrated into essential governance and compliance systems throughout e&. This announcement was made in Davos, Switzerland, marking a significant step for the company in embracing advanced artificial intelligence technology.

data.title: Cross-chain bridges pose risk to crypto, creating vulnerabilities that may lead to a crisis. #FTX #crypto #bridges
data.description: Interconnected bridges between different blockchains centralize trust and concentrate risk, potentially leading to vulnerabilities that could spark a widespread cryptocurrency crisis during times of market strain.

data.title: Dynacor exceeds 2025 sales and production goals, reveals 2026 outlook.
data.description: Dynacor Group Inc. has released its initial operating figures for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 along with its expectations for 2026. The company reported a total revenue of $X million in the fourth quarter and $Y million for the entire year of 2025. Looking ahead to 2026, Dynacor projects significant growth opportunities in various sectors, aiming to achieve a revenue target of $Z million. The company's optimistic outlook suggests a promising trajectory for its operations in the upcoming year, building on the success of the previous year.
